chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special High Court Appeal No.291 of 2015 Muhammad Irfan Sooria and another Versus Bank Al-Falah Private Limited and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Mr. Justice Omar Sial. Dated 12.03.2024 Mr. Irfan Ahmed Memon, Advocate for the Appellant. Mr. Aijaz Hussain Shirazi, Advocate for the Respondent No.1. Mr. Mubarak Ali Shah, Advocate for Respondent No.2..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the appellant, in view of the dismissal of Special High Court Appeal No.04/2016, does not press this appeal and would avail remedy before the executing court. The appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
